meaning: adj.未填塞(或装满)的,不拥挤的
examples: Moreover, insecurity could deprive Mr Karzai of votes in his electoral stronghold, the ethnic-Pushtun south—assuming ballot-boxes are unstuffed.
Still, I prefer to cook the roast unstuffed and then, after cooking, spoon some bright and gingery braised red cabbage into the empty crown.
